exact_function_section_changed: dashboard_server.py -> _stream_positions_mark() REST fallback polling gate immediately after GLOBAL_STATE_HUB.snapshot(stale_after_sec=15.0)

old_behavior_vs_new_behavior.old: REST fallback polling triggered whenever mark_age exceeded threshold, even if a fresh polymarket_stream mark was already authoritative enough for display decisions.
old_behavior_vs_new_behavior.new: REST fallback polling now triggers only when the current mark is missing or stale and there is no fresh non-stale polymarket_stream mark for that market. Fresh stream marks stay authoritative.

verification_performed: Confirmed dashboard UI only renders mark_source and is not the source-selection bug
Checked runtime/log context for active [STALE_POLL] and stream traffic
